purpose: List, upsert, and delete Fund Sub-Types - the optional middle tier between Fund Type and Fund.

response_shape_get.field_name_asymmetry: GET wraps in {fundSubTypes:[]} and uses fundSubType-prefixed names (except fundTypeId which is bare). PUT expects bare names. Use scripts.funds.normalize_fund_sub_types().

semantics.put_is_whole_list_replace: Same rules as FundType - empty-array PUT is a silent no-op. Use DELETE to remove rows.
semantics.delete_behavior: Single-row DELETE. Returns 400 with messages if a Fund still has fundSubTypeId set to this id. Drain dependents (PUT /v1/Fund with fundSubTypeId removed) or check eligibility first.
semantics.fund_assignment_to_sub_type_is_separate: Assigning Funds to a sub-type happens by setting fundSubTypeId on the Fund record (via PUT /v1/Fund), not by listing funds inside the sub-type body.
